description: Flux inference-engine hooks — advisory-only. Notify when an artifact lands; never auto-trigger reconcile.

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [ "${FLUX_INFERENCE_ENABLED:-0}" = "1" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq "(state/precedent\.jsonl|plugins/inference-engine/state/artifacts\.jsonl)$"; then echo "[inference-engine] artifact landed: $(basename "$FILE") — /inference-reconcile when ready" >&2; fi; exit 0'
